summary: Iteration 17 - All discount frontend display features verified. Group discounts (3+ participants = 10% off) and Combo discounts (2+ programs = 5% off) are correctly displaying on CartPage, CartCheckoutPage, and EnrollmentPage. Backend API POST /api/discounts/calculate returns correct discount breakdown. Admin Panel Discounts & Loyalty tab shows all 4 toggles working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: CartPage.jsx: autoDiscounts state + useEffect with debounced POST /api/discounts/calculate - working correctly
CartPage.jsx: data-testid='cart-discount-group' and data-testid='cart-discount-combo' correctly displaying green discount lines
CartCheckoutPage.jsx: data-testid='discount-group', data-testid='discount-combo', data-testid='discount-loyalty' in Order Summary
EnrollmentPage.jsx: data-testid='enroll-discount-group' and data-testid='enroll-discount-loyalty' in price summary panel
discounts.py: POST /calculate correctly applies group discount first, then combo on remaining amount
All discount calculations are rounded to nearest integer
context_for_next_testing_agent: All discount frontend display features verified in iteration 17: (1) CartPage shows Combo Discount when 2+ programs and Group Discount when 3+ participants, (2) CartCheckoutPage Order Summary shows all discount lines (group, combo, loyalty), (3) EnrollmentPage left panel shows Group Discount and Loyalty Discount, (4) Admin Panel Discounts & Loyalty tab has all 4 toggles working (Referral, Group, Combo, Loyalty) with Active Discounts Preview section. Current settings: group_discount ON (3+ participants = 10% off), combo_discount ON (2+ programs = 5% off), loyalty ON (8% for returning clients). Phone OTP is MOCKED.

enrollment_page_discounts.loyalty_discount_placeholder: PASS - Loyalty discount line appears when returning client email detected

admin_panel_discounts_tab.combo_discount_toggle: PASS - ON with settings (2+ programs = 5% off)
admin_panel_discounts_tab.loyalty_toggle: PASS - ON with setting (8% off for returning clients)
